description: A trail of ancestor locations ending at the current one. An explicit return path for hierarchies deeper than tabs.

items.description: The trail, root first. The last entry is the current location and is never a link.

separator.description: Drawn between crumbs, never before the first. Arena draws it, in its own aria-hidden span.

navigate.description: A non-current crumb was activated, carrying that crumb alone. The native MouseEvent is not forwarded, so a listener cannot call preventDefault() on the anchor's own navigation -- ctrl-click, middle-click and open-in-new-tab still work for a consumer who wires nothing; intercepting a plain click to substitute SPA routing belongs at the router (routerLink, Link), not here.
